docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOPP, NOAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANDY, CARLOS $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES UNDER CIVIL CODE 1950.5 IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 HAVE BEEN INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO THE DEFENDANT'S VIOLATION IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY KOPP, NOAH AS TO DEFENDANT HANDY, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOPP, NOAH AS TO DEFENDANT HANDY, CARLOS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED JUL-24-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HANDY, CARLOS
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 9/12/2013 TO DEFENDANT <NO SUCH NUMBER UNABLE TO FORWARD>
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $43.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $184.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT HANDY, CARLOS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HANDY, CARLOS HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PUTTING OEX OFF-CALENDAR. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOPP, NOAH
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $29.64 ACCRUED INTEREST, $135.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT HANDY, CARLOS
DILIGENCE / O.E.X FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOPP, NOAH

TRIAL RESET TO SEP-10-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-08-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
